title: chamaebuxus balansae
intro: Chamaebuxus balansae, also known as the Balansa boxwood, is a small evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, rounded leaves and compact growth habit. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Vietnam, where its roots are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The medicinal properties of Chamaebuxus balansae are said to provide various health benefits, including relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Chamaebuxus balansae is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically consumed orally to leverage its medicinal benefits.
